The orchestrator-owned temporal-pyramid **L1 (session) / L2 (daily) durable aggregation lane** — the ADR 0028 substrate, built on the #14897 scaffold. The Orchestrator owns cadence + the heavy-maintenance lease and spawns a **supervised one-shot child** per due tick; the lane is classified **local-only** (checkout-bound sources) per ADR 0014 §9.

> **Draft** — AC2–AC7 complete + verified; **AC8** (live Chroma upsert / idempotent replay / orchestrator-owned execution) is the last gate. `aggregationEnabled` stays `false` until every AC passes (AC1), so the lane is inert by construction until then.

Resolves #14938
Refs #14434 · #12676 · Related: #12679 · #14811

## Deltas

Fourteen commits — implementation across engine → service → orchestrator, hardened by three cross-family review rounds.

**Implementation**
1. **Engine L1 planner** — `resolveSessionWindow` / `planSessionWindows`. `level:'session'` is a sub-daily **clock** window (the metadata keys every tier by `{windowStart, windowEnd}`, no sessionId), so each L1 window nests within exactly one L2 day — no cross-window double-count.
2. **Service L1/L2 planning** — `collectPendingWindows` plans **both** tiers each cycle, each tagged with its `level` so `runCycle` mints the matching record.
3. **AC4 `sandboxesGraduated`** — counts only exact `[GRADUATED_TO_TICKET: #N]` / `Epic #N` **marker-LEADING author-actions** (after heading / bold / backtick wrappers), window-filtered by the marker's **event timestamp** (its enclosing dated comment). Rejects inline prose, blockquotes, and fenced/indented code; dedupes per discussion+ticket; fails closed on a marker outside a dated comment (`createdAt` is not the edit time).
4. **AC5 graph write** — `persistTemporalRecord` mints the `SUMMARY_SESSION` / `SUMMARY_DAILY` node (durable/dynamic-boundary guarded), linked to the Chroma row by `semanticVectorId`; this deterministic lane is the sole writer.
5. **AC6 version + retention** — `TEMPORAL_AGGREGATION_VERSION` (append-only **contract** version: same-contract re-folds overwrite idempotently; a material contract bump mints a new version, old versions retained) + `versionsToPrune` (keep newest N). The service prune deletes overflow **graph-first, then Chroma** (retry-safe — the Chroma doc is the "needs pruning" signal), guarded to a no-op at the steady-state version.

**Orchestration (AC2)** — registered in `TASK_REGISTRY` as `supervised-child-process` / heavy / exclusive-heavy, classified heavy in the `MaintenanceBackpressureService` SSOT. A `buildTaskDefinitions` entry spawns the one-shot child `ai/scripts/maintenance/aggregate-temporal-summary.mjs` (runs one `runCycle()`, exits — no timer, no self-reschedule). `buildOrchestratorSchedulingOptions` wires the cadence + the deployment-gated enable; the orchestrator keeps cadence + the heavy lease (`executeSupervisedCandidate` → `acquireLeaseAndExecute` spawns the child under it).

**Deployment (ADR 0014 §9)** — `local-only` classification (dated ADR amendment, mirroring the tenant-repo-sync shape) + `orchestrator.localOnly.temporalSummaryEnabled`; the `temporalSummaryEnabled` getter ANDs the deployment gate with the ADR-0028 opt-in.

## Contract Ledger

| Consumed surface | Consumer | Change | Compatibility |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TASK_REGISTRY` | orchestrator collector / picker | +`temporal-summary` (supervised-child, heavy) | additive; inert while disabled |
| `DEFAULT_HEAVY_MAINTENANCE_TASK_NAMES` | `isHeavyMaintenanceTask` | +`temporal-summary` | additive; SSOT-pin test in lockstep |
| `buildTaskDefinitions` | orchestrator supervisor | +one-shot child command | additive; seeds `createInitialTaskState` (closes the `markStarted` crash) |
| `AiConfig.orchestrator.localOnly.temporalSummaryEnabled` | deployment gate | new tracked-template leaf | missing-key → deployment-profile default (resolver-safe) |
| `SUMMARY_SESSION` / `SUMMARY_DAILY` graph nodes | Native Edge Graph | this deterministic lane is the sole writer | ADR 0024 §2.2 already registers the types |
| `temporal-summary` Chroma collection | dynamic-synthesis path | idempotent per `{window, track, version}` | append-only + bounded retention |

Evidence: every increment was verified green in isolation before commit; three exact-head cross-family review rounds caught seven real defects (topology, taskState crash, marker over-count, retention ordering, stub leak), each V-B-A'd and fixed with a witness.

## Test Evidence

- `temporalSummaryAggregationEngine.spec` — **28/28** (L1 planner + nesting; version-progression; `versionsToPrune` retention).
- `TemporalSummaryAggregationService.spec` — **19/19** (L1/L2 planning; the six source binds; AC4 marker-leading + prose/quote/original-post falsifiers; AC5 graph write + durable boundary; AC6 prune + graph-first retry-safety witness; partial-source-failure).
- `registry.spec` — **17/17** (supervised-child descriptor + heavy-SSOT parity).
- `pipeline.spec` — **23/23** (supervised-child dispatch through the heavy lease; cadence/enable wiring).
- `MaintenanceBackpressureService.spec` — heavy-SSOT pin updated. ⚠️ Its `acquireLeaseAndExecute` / `resolveHeavyMaintenanceLeasePath` lease-file-I/O tests fail **pre-existing** in this worktree (stash-verified on clean HEAD, logically independent of the heavy-set membership change).

## Post-Merge Validation

**AC8 — the remaining gate, before enablement:** one real Chroma upsert, one idempotent replay, and one orchestrator-owned execution, proven against live infra **before** `aggregationEnabled` flips. Until then the lane is inert by construction: the `enables.temporalSummary` guard fails closed, so no window is ever planned, dispatched, or written.
